headline: Enphase Energy (ENPH) Stock Looks Above Fair Value On Cash Flow But Fair On Earnings
summary: Enphase Energy stock sits at an awkward point for valuation minded investors, with a five year share price decline standing against a mixed set of checks and an intrinsic value estimate from a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model that flags the shares as expensive. Over the past 5 years, Enphase Energy has fallen about 73.9%, which puts recent rallies into the context of a long, difficult stretch for long term holders. Expectations around new solid state transformer and microinverter products...

headline: Is Index Reclassification And U.S. Inverter Review Altering The Investment Case For Enphase Energy (ENPH)?
summary: In late June 2026, Enphase Energy was reclassified across multiple Russell indexes, moving from several growth benchmarks into a range of value benchmarks, while at the same time advancing its IQ9 microinverter and IQ9S‑3P commercial microinverter lines built on gallium nitride technology for residential and commercial solar markets. A separate catalyst was the U.S. government’s consideration of restrictions on certain foreign-made power inverters on national security grounds, which could...
